90→ */
    91→export async function checkFollow(
    92→  screenName: string, targetHandle: string, apiKey?: string,
    93→): Promise<boolean | null> {
    94→  const key = apiKey ?? process.env.RAPID_API_KEY ?? ''
    95→  if (!key) return null
    96→  try {
    97→    console.log('-------------------------------- checkFollow --------------------------------', screenName, targetHandle)
    98→    const url = `${BASE}/checkfollow.php?screenname=${encodeURIComponent(screenName)}&target=${encodeURIComponent(targetHandle)}`
    99→    const res = await fetch(url, {
   100→      headers: headers(key),
   101→      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(TIMEOUT_MS),
   102→    })
   103→    console.log('-------------------------------- checkFollow res --------------------------------', res)
   104→    const data = await res.json() as { is_follow?: boolean }
   105→    console.log('-------------------------------- checkFollow data --------------------------------', data)
   106→    return data.is_follow ?? false
   107→  } catch (error) {
   108→    console.log('')
   109→    console.log('-------------------------------- checkFollow error --------------------------------', error)
   110→    return null
   111→  }
   112→}
   113→
